expected_action: allow direct runtime import inside src/third_party because that directory defines the barrel surface
directive: In src/**/*.ts, do not add runtime imports from third-party packages that are re-exported by src/third_party/index.ts; import runtime values from the local src/third_party/index.js barrel instead. Type-only imports and files under src/third_party/ are allowed.

content: Add a tiny semver helper module beside the other third-party wrappers so the barrel can re-export it later.

content.text: I’ll check the third-party barrel layout before adding the wrapper in the allowed wrapper directory.

name: tool
content: src/third_party/index.ts contains direct imports and re-exports for bundled third-party dependencies.

content.text: This file is inside src/third_party, so a direct semver import belongs at this layer.
